name: ClipPlane
summary: The ClipPlane class defines a clip plane which can be used together with a visible view.

constructors.name: ClipPlane
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ClipPlane class.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the clip plane from the application view. The application view must be visible.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Creates a new clip plane to the application view. The application view must be visible.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the clip plane position in the application view. The application view must be visible.

properties.name: IsBorderVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the clip plane border is visible.

properties.name: IsScissorVisible
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the clip plane scissor icon is visible.

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: The clip plane location in global coordinates (XYZ).

properties.name: UpVector
properties.summary: The clip plane up vector in global coordinates (XYZ).

properties.name: View
properties.summary: The view the clip plane belongs to.
